newsletter.balance_advice_positive: A positive standing means you have provided more than you have received. Consider using it!
newsletter.balance_advice_negative: A negative standing is not a problem; it simply means you have received more than you have provided. Try to balance it when you can.
newsletter.balance_advice_balanced: A standing close to zero means you have provided and received in a balanced way.
newsletter.activity_count_one: You recorded one trade this past month.
newsletter.activity_count_other: You recorded {{count}} trades this past month.
newsletter.alert_no_offers_negative_text: You have no offers published. Surely you have a skill or service that could be useful to the community. Posting your offers can help you improve your standing.
newsletter.alert_no_needs_positive_text: You have a positive standing and no needs published. Think about what you might need and publish it so other users can connect with you.
newsletter.alert_no_needs_text: You have no needs published. Publishing your needs helps other users connect with you.
newsletter.alert_no_image_text: A profile picture helps other users recognise you and builds more trust.
newsletter.alert_no_location_text: If you add your location to your profile, other users will know where you are and it will be easier to connect. It doesn't need to be very precise.
newsletter.alert_expired_offers_text: You have {{count}} expired offers and they are no longer visible to other users. Update them if you still want to offer them, or hide them if they are no longer valid.

notifications.transfer_sent_body: A trade was recorded. You received a service worth {{amount}} from {{recipient}}.
notifications.transfer_received_body: A trade was recorded. You provided {{amount}} worth of services to {{sender}}.
notifications.transfer_pending_body: {{sender}} has recorded receiving a service worth {{amount}} from you. Please accept or reject it as soon as possible.
notifications.transfer_rejected_body: {{name}} rejected a trade of {{amount}} and it won't be recorded.
notifications.transfer_still_pending_body: Trade of {{amount}} with {{name}} is still pending after {{ duration, duration }}. Please accept or reject it as soon as possible.
notifications.member_no_offers_body: Create one to help others and improve your standing of {{balance}}. What can you offer?
notifications.member_no_needs_body: Post a need to help others connect with you and use your standing. What do you need?

emails.reason_active_member: You are receiving this email as an active user of {{groupName}} on {{appName}}.
emails.welcome_text_1: You have been accepted as a user of {{groupName}}. Your account number is {{code}}.
emails.welcome_text_2: You can now sign in to {{appName}} to explore other users in your community and their offers and needs. Please take a minute to complete your profile with relevant contact details, description and photo. You can also complete your offers and needs with a detailed description and images.
emails.transfer_sent_text: A trade has been recorded. You received a service worth {{amount}} from {{recipient}}.
emails.transfer_received_text: A trade has been recorded. You provided {{amount}} worth of services to {{sender}}.
emails.transfer_pending_text: {{sender}} has recorded receiving a service worth {{amount}} from you. Please accept or reject it.
emails.transfer_pending_subtext: It is very important to keep community standings up to date. Please take action as soon as possible.
emails.transfer_rejected_subtext: If you think this is a mistake, please contact them to accept a new trade, or contact the community administrators if necessary.
emails.group_activated_subtext: You can now sign in to {{appName}} and configure the community and currency settings, including allowed trade methods, credit limits, and categories for offers and needs. After that, invite users and start trading. Good luck making your community grow!
